package.name: auv_sim_stonefish
package.description: Stonefish scenario + adapter for the BlueROV2 (spec §7.2, M4). High-fidelity marine sim (FLS/SSS/MSIS/multibeam). Requires the vendored Stonefish library and stonefish_ros2 (scripts/build_stonefish.sh); publishes into the same contract as the Gazebo path.
